events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: concrete placement in progress, observed segregation from excessive drop height. This is a sequence/procedure violation. Need to stop work, correct placement method, remove/replace segregated concrete. Decision fail, risk high/critical. Component condition installed-defective. Percent complete maybe 50. Value 0. Confidence high. Order: stop placement, assess drop height, use chute/pump/truck, remove segregated concrete, resume placement with proper drop height, consolidate properly. Workable maybe none until corrected. References ACI 301, 304.

  "rationale": "Excessive drop height causes segregation of coarse aggregate from mortar, producing defective in-place concrete. ACI 301 and 304 require controlled placement to maintain homogeneity; work must stop and the defective placement must be corrected before continuing.",
